name: hireme-project
description: 통합된 HireMe 프로젝트 - 관리자 대시보드와 클라이언트 애플리케이션

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run start:admin" "npm run start:client"
scripts.start:client: cd client/frontend && set PORT=3002 && npm start
scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:client
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd admin/frontend && npm install && cd ../../client/frontend && npm install
scripts.test: npm run test:admin && npm run test:client
